main.name: Valgavoth, Harrower of Souls
main.oracle_text:
Flying
Ward—Pay 2 life.
Whenever an opponent loses life for the first time during each of their turns, put a +1/+1 counter on Valgavoth and draw a card.

card.name: Solemn Simulacrum
card.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
When this creature dies, you may draw a card.

card.name: Underworld Dreams
card.oracle_text: Whenever an opponent draws a card, this enchantment deals 1 damage to that player.
card.flavor_text: "In the drowsy dark cave of the mind dreams build their nest with fragments dropped from day's caravan." —Rabindranath Tagore

card.name: Spellshock
card.oracle_text: Whenever a player casts a spell, this enchantment deals 2 damage to that player.
card.flavor_text: A snap of fingers, a snap of teeth.

card.name: Terminate
card.oracle_text: Destroy target creature. It can't be regenerated.
card.flavor_text:
"I've seen death before. My mother succumbing to illness, my comrades bleeding on the battlefield . . . But I'd never seen anything as dreadful as that."
—Taani, berserker of Etlan

card.name: Arid Mesa
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Mountain or Plains card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Marsh Flats
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Plains or Swamp card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Rakdos Signet
card.flavor_text: Made of bone and boiled in blood, a Rakdos signet is not considered finished until it has been used as a murder weapon.

card.name: Scalding Tarn
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for an Island or Mountain card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Verdant Catacombs
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Swamp or Forest card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Howling Mine
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of each player's draw step, if this artifact is untapped, that player draws an additional card.
card.flavor_text: Legend has it that the mine howls out the last words of those who died inside.

card.name: Lotus Petal
card.oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.
card.flavor_text: "Hard to imagine," mused Hanna, stroking the petal, "such a lovely flower inspiring such greed."

card.name: Prismatic Vista
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: There is beauty in the uncertainty of potential.

card.name: Zo-Zu the Punisher
card.oracle_text: Whenever a land enters, Zo-Zu deals 2 damage to that land's controller.
card.flavor_text: He does not tolerate intruders.

card.name: Blood Crypt
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {B} or {R}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.
card.flavor_text: Where the dead serve as diversion, decor, and dessert.

card.name: Blood Seeker
card.oracle_text: Whenever a creature an opponent controls enters, you may have that player lose 1 life.
card.flavor_text: A drop now is all he needs to find you later.

card.name: Shadowspear
card.flavor_text: A weapon of darkness for a warrior of light.

card.name: Lightning Greaves
card.oracle_text:
Equipped creature has haste and shroud. (It can't be the target of spells or abilities.)
Equip {0}
card.flavor_text: After lightning struck the cliffs, the ore became iron, the iron became steel, and the steel became greaves. The lightning never left.

card.name: Reanimate
card.oracle_text: Put target creature card from a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control. You lose life equal to that card's mana value.
card.flavor_text:
"You'd better be worth it."
—Liliana Vess

card.name: Manabarbs
card.oracle_text: Whenever a player taps a land for mana, this enchantment deals 1 damage to that player.
card.flavor_text:
"I don't know why people say a double-edged sword is bad. It's a sword. With two edges."
—Kamahl, pit fighter

card.name: Bloodstained Mire
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Swamp or Mountain card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: Where dragons once triumphed, their bones now molder.

card.name: Polluted Delta
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for an Island or Swamp card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: Where dragons once prevailed, their bones now sink.

card.name: Wooded Foothills
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Mountain or Forest card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: Where dragons' breath once burned, their bones now freeze.

card.name: Dark Ritual
card.oracle_text: Add {B}{B}{B}.

card.name: Ankh of Mishra
card.oracle_text: Whenever a land enters, this artifact deals 2 damage to that land's controller.

card.name: Copper Tablet
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of each player's upkeep, this artifact deals 1 damage to that player.

card.name: Luxury Suite
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {B} or {R}.

card.name: Roiling Vortex
card.oracle_text:
At the beginning of each player's upkeep, this enchantment deals 1 damage to them.
Whenever a player casts a spell, if no mana was spent to cast that spell, this enchantment deals 5 damage to that player.
{R}: Your opponents can't gain life this turn.

card.name: Fellwar Stone
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color that a land an opponent controls could produce.
card.flavor_text:
"What do you have that I cannot obtain?"
—Mairsil, the Pretender

card.name: Nightshade Harvester
card.oracle_text: Whenever a land an opponent controls enters, that player loses 1 life. Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
card.flavor_text: "Anywhere the moonlight touches—that's my garden."

card.name: Urza's Saga
card.oracle_text:
(As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.)
I — This Saga gains "{T}: Add {C}."
II — This Saga gains "{2}, {T}: Create a 0/0 colorless Construct artifact creature token with 'This token gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control.'"
III — Search your library for an artifact card with mana cost {0} or {1}, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Bloodchief Ascension
card.oracle_text:
At the beginning of each end step, if an opponent lost 2 or more life this turn, you may put a quest counter on this enchantment. (Damage causes loss of life.)
Whenever a card is put into an opponent's graveyard from anywhere, if this enchantment has three or more quest counters on it, you may have that player lose 2 life. If you do, you gain 2 life.

card.name: Fable of the Mirror-Breaker // Reflection of Kiki-Jiki
card.type_line: Enchantment — Saga // Enchantment Creature — Goblin Shaman

card_faces.name: Fable of the Mirror-Breaker
card_faces.oracle_text:
(As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter.)
I — Create a 2/2 red Goblin Shaman creature token with "Whenever this token attacks, create a Treasure token."
II — You may discard up to two cards. If you do, draw that many cards.
III — Exile this Saga, then return it to the battlefield transformed under your control.

card_faces.name: Reflection of Kiki-Jiki
card_faces.oracle_text: {1}, {T}: Create a token that's a copy of another target nonlegendary creature you control, except it has haste. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.
card_faces.flavor_text: Blessed by Keiga, the Tide Star, Kiki-Jiki would one day master the art of duplication.

card.set_name: Commander Legends: Battle for Baldur's Gate
card.name: Rug of Smothering
card.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever a player casts a spell, they lose 1 life for each spell they've cast this turn.
card.flavor_text:
"No, not an accessory to murder—I'm looking for an accessory *for* murder."
—Nadja, Flaming Fist investigator

card.name: Damnation
card.oracle_text: Destroy all creatures. They can't be regenerated.

card.name: Sheoldred, the Apocalypse
card.oracle_text:
Deathtouch
Whenever you draw a card, you gain 2 life.
Whenever an opponent draws a card, they lose 2 life.
card.flavor_text: "Gix failed. I shall not."

card.name: Arcane Signet
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
card.flavor_text: All Necrons bear the mark of the Triarch, a brand upon their living-metal skin that binds them to their dynasty.

card.name: Teferi's Puzzle Box
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of each player's draw step, that player puts the cards in their hand on the bottom of their library in any order, then draws that many cards.

card.name: Winds of Change
card.oracle_text: Each player shuffles the cards from their hand into their library, then draws that many cards.
card.flavor_text: Sometimes, a butterfly flapping its wings is insufficient.

card.set_name: The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth
card.name: The One Ring
card.oracle_text:
Indestructible
When The One Ring enters, if you cast it, you gain protection from everything until your next turn.
At the beginning of your upkeep, you lose 1 life for each burden counter on The One Ring.
{T}: Put a burden counter on The One Ring, then draw a card for each burden counter on The One Ring.

card.set_name: March of the Machine: The Aftermath
card.name: Ob Nixilis, Captive Kingpin
card.oracle_text:
Flying, trample
Whenever one or more opponents each lose exactly 1 life, put a +1/+1 counter on Ob Nixilis. Exile the top card of your library. Until your next end step, you may play that card.

card.name: Ancient Tomb
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}{C}. This land deals 2 damage to you.
card.flavor_text:
On the slab runes were deeply graven:
BALIN
SON OF FUNDIN
LORD OF MORIA

card.name: Urborg, Tomb of Yawgmoth
card.oracle_text: Each land is a Swamp in addition to its other land types.
card.flavor_text:
"All dead, all rotten. Elves and Men and Orcs. There was a great battle here long ago, yes."
—Gollum

card.name: Cabal Coffers
card.oracle_text: {2}, {T}: Add {B} for each Swamp you control.
card.flavor_text:
"Evil things came forth, and they took Minas Ithil and abode in it, and they made it into a place of dread; it is now called Minas Morgul, the Tower of Sorcery."
—Elrond

card.name: Harsh Mentor
card.oracle_text: Whenever an opponent activates an ability of an artifact, creature, or land on the battlefield, if it isn't a mana ability, this creature deals 2 damage to that player.
card.flavor_text:
"A time may come soon when there will be need of valor without renown. Yet the deeds will not be less valiant because they are unpraised."
—Aragorn

card.name: Deadly Rollick
card.oracle_text:
If you control a commander, you may cast this spell without paying its mana cost.
Exile target creature.
card.flavor_text: "Anyone can make their audience beg for an encore . . . I prefer mine to beg for mercy!"

card.set_name: The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth
card.name: Orcish Bowmasters
card.oracle_text:
Flash
When this creature enters and whenever an opponent draws a card except the first one they draw in each of their draw steps, this creature deals 1 damage to any target. Then amass Orcs 1.

card.name: Command Tower
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
card.flavor_text:
"New Vegas is more than a city—it's the remedy to mankind's derailment."
—Mr. House

card.name: Scytheclaw Raptor
card.oracle_text: Whenever a player casts a spell, if it's not their turn, this creature deals 4 damage to them.

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Falkenrath Noble
card.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever this creature or another creature dies, target player loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
card.flavor_text: "I often think on how excited they must feel to be chosen as my prey."

card.name: Guttersnipe
card.oracle_text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature deals 2 damage to each opponent.
card.flavor_text: He wants to watch Ravnica burn, one soul at a time.

card.name: Raucous Theater
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {B} or {R}.)
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Blasphemous Act
card.oracle_text:
This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature on the battlefield.
Blasphemous Act deals 13 damage to each creature.
card.flavor_text: Everyone knew the bombs were coming. Everyone but the public.

card.name: Basilisk Collar
card.oracle_text:
Equipped creature has deathtouch and lifelink. (Any amount of damage it deals to a creature is enough to destroy it. Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.)
Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)
card.flavor_text: A mark of companionship, not subservience.

card.name: Talisman of Indulgence
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add {B} or {R}. This artifact deals 1 damage to you.
card.flavor_text: After decades of squalor, wastelanders would kill for a new hairdo.

card.name: Magebane Lizard
card.oracle_text: Whenever a player casts a noncreature spell, this creature deals damage to that player equal to the number of noncreature spells they've cast this turn.
card.flavor_text:
"I didn't miss. Blasted thing snatched my bolt out of the air and ate it!"
—Lilah, Slickshot boss

card.name: Jet Medallion
card.oracle_text: Black spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Ruby Medallion
card.oracle_text: Red spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Toxic Deluge
card.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay X life.
All creatures get -X/-X until end of turn.
card.flavor_text:
"It's a difficult task to quarantine a plague that moves with the clouds."
—Esara, healer adept

card.name: Talon Gates of Madara
card.oracle_text:
When this land enters, up to one target creature phases out.
{T}: Add {C}.
{1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color.
{4}: Put this card from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Razorkin Needlehead
card.oracle_text:
This creature has first strike during your turn.
Whenever an opponent draws a card, this creature deals 1 damage to them.
card.flavor_text: "Stitch your eyes, stitch your skin, stitch your mouth into a grin."

card.name: Blazemire Verge
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {B}.
{T}: Add {R}. Activate only if you control a Swamp or a Mountain.
card.flavor_text: Here, the Balemurk spits and boils, the oppressive darkness pierced by scorching spears of fire.

card.name: Withering Torment
card.oracle_text: Destroy target creature or enchantment. You lose 2 life.
card.flavor_text:
"DO NOT OPEN. Not a door."
—Bloodstained note

card.name: Gleeful Arsonist
card.oracle_text:
Whenever an opponent casts a noncreature spell, this creature deals damage equal to its power to that player.
Undying (When this creature dies, if it had no +1/+1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a +1/+1 counter on it.)
card.flavor_text: "Let the world burn!"

card.name: Persistent Constrictor
card.oracle_text:
At the beginning of each opponent's upkeep, they lose 1 life and you put a -1/-1 counter on up to one target creature they control.
Persist (When this creature dies, if it had no -1/-1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a -1/-1 counter on it.)

card.name: Mogis, God of Slaughter
card.oracle_text:
Indestructible
As long as your devotion to black and red is less than seven, Mogis isn't a creature.
At the beginning of each opponent's upkeep, Mogis deals 2 damage to that player unless they sacrifice a creature of their choice.

card.name: Fate Unraveler
card.oracle_text: Whenever an opponent draws a card, this creature deals 1 damage to that player.
card.flavor_text:
"Never forget that the life you've built can be undone by a single loose thread."
—Perisophia the philosopher

card.name: Vial Smasher the Fierce
card.oracle_text:
Whenever you cast your first spell each turn, choose an opponent at random. Vial Smasher deals damage equal to that spell's mana value to that player or a planeswalker that player controls.
Partner (You can have two commanders if both have partner.)

card.name: Mayhem Devil
card.oracle_text: Whenever a player sacrifices a permanent, this creature deals 1 damage to any target.
card.flavor_text: Despite their stake in the city's survival, Rakdos cultists are loath to pass up any opportunity to sow chaos.

card.name: Chaos Warp
card.oracle_text: The owner of target permanent shuffles it into their library, then reveals the top card of their library. If it's a permanent card, they put it onto the battlefield.

card.name: Kederekt Parasite
card.oracle_text: Whenever an opponent draws a card, if you control a red permanent, you may have this creature deal 1 damage to that player.
card.flavor_text: When the smell of passing thoughts piques its hunger, its maw becomes primed with acid and a taste for brains.

card.name: Kaervek the Merciless
card.oracle_text: Whenever an opponent casts a spell, Kaervek deals damage equal to that spell's mana value to any target.
card.flavor_text:
"Rats and jackals feast in his swath, but even they will not walk with him."
—Mangara

card.name: Kardur, Doomscourge
card.oracle_text:
When Kardur enters, until your next turn, creatures your opponents control attack each combat if able and attack a player other than you if able.
Whenever an attacking creature dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Rampaging Ferocidon
card.oracle_text:
Menace
Players can't gain life.
Whenever another creature enters, this creature deals 1 damage to that creature's controller.
card.flavor_text: All raptors are aggressive, but ferocidons seem to enjoy their prey's pain.

card.name: Spiteful Visions
card.oracle_text:
At the beginning of each player's draw step, that player draws an additional card.
Whenever a player draws a card, this enchantment deals 1 damage to that player.
card.flavor_text: Knowledge brings the sting of disillusionment, but the pain teaches perspective.

card.name: Stormfist Crusader
card.oracle_text:
Menace
At the beginning of your upkeep, each player draws a card and loses 1 life.
card.flavor_text:
"As she reached the pinnacle, lightning flashed and her eyes blazed with newfound power."
—*Legend of the Gilded Knights*

card.name: Witch's Clinic
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{2}, {T}: Target commander gains lifelink until end of turn.
card.flavor_text: Students from other colleges are invited to visit Witherbloom's medical facilities. Not many do.

card.name: Bloodthirsty Conqueror
card.oracle_text:
Flying, deathtouch
Whenever an opponent loses life, you gain that much life. (Damage causes loss of life.)
card.flavor_text: "Your death will be neither quick nor painless. Agony makes blood so much sweeter."

card.name: Scrawling Crawler
card.oracle_text:
At the beginning of your upkeep, each player draws a card.
Whenever an opponent draws a card, that player loses 1 life.
card.flavor_text: It spreads the machine gospel of New Phyrexia, its task incomplete until all surrender to perfection.

card.name: Reforge the Soul
card.oracle_text:
Each player discards their hand, then draws seven cards.
Miracle {1}{R} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)
card.flavor_text: In a wave of spells called the Cursemute, Avacyn cleansed the world with divine fire.

card.name: Deadpool, Trading Card
card.oracle_text:
As Deadpool enters, you may exchange his text box and another creature's.
At the beginning of your upkeep, you lose 3 life.
{3}, Sacrifice this creature: Each other player draws a card.
card.flavor_text: "Draw me like one of your French cards."

card.name: Graven Cairns
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{B/R}, {T}: Add {B}{B}, {B}{R}, or {R}{R}.
card.flavor_text:
"At times we were friendly rivals, and at times we were simply friends. We'd always talk about our dreams... Like which of us would be first to sail beyond the sky to the stars."
—Setzer Gabbiani

card.name: Geier Reach Sanitarium
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{2}, {T}: Each player draws a card, then discards a card.
card.flavor_text: Kick up your prehensile appendages and rest a while.

card.name: Sol Ring
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}{C}.
card.flavor_text:
"Model? I'm insulted. It's by all reasonable metrics a fully functional planetary system, scaled down for easier study."
—Urza, to Tawnos

card.name: The Lord of Pain
card.oracle_text:
Menace
Your opponents can't gain life.
Whenever a player casts their first spell each turn, choose another target player. The Lord of Pain deals damage equal to that spell's mana value to the chosen player.
